posts.text: SLBM - next passive income stream for small investors? — You can DM me your Zerodha client ID. I will arrange the call.

posts.author: User1896
posts.text: SLBM - next passive income stream for small investors? — Hi sir, can I connect with you via Gmail for The Query regarding the aforementioned Charges

posts.author: Shubhanshu
posts.text: SLBM - next passive income stream for small investors? — Borrowed stocks can be pledged, and the normal pledge charge applies — ₹30 + GST per ISIN, irrespective of quantity. The SLB schedule of charges document (available on the support portal) can be ignored here, as it does not apply to retail SLB.

posts.author: User1896
posts.text: SLBM - next passive income stream for small investors? — Right now in Zerodha Brokerage is 20% of the Renting Fees On Dhan it is Nil But If you want to Borrow shares and for that you want to make a Pledge That is when Zerodha Gets Expensive For SLBM pledge the charges are 0.04% of the Pledged value which is very very high

posts.text: SLBM - next passive income stream for small investors? — Hi @User1896 under current Zerodha structure how much does it cost to lend ? I understand it is percentage basis, wanted to know if high breakeven is a deal breaker.
